title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hindustan Petroleum is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Petroleum is actively seeking a talented and motivated Quality Control Engineer to join our dynamic team in Thane. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hindustan Petroleum:
Hindustan Petroleum is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
